articles.title_en: ASEAN countries shown interest in Russian monitoring systems
articles.lead_en: The Russian experience shows that the ERA-GLONASS system reduces the number of casualties in serious accidents by alerting emergency services in a timely manner, GLONASS CEO Alexey Raikevich stressed
articles.title_raw: ASEAN countries shown interest in Russian monitoring systems
articles.lead_raw: The Russian experience shows that the ERA-GLONASS system reduces the number of casualties in serious accidents by alerting emergency services in a timely manner, GLONASS CEO Alexey Raikevich stressed

articles.title_en: A Russian warship fired warning shots at an elderly British couple near the Isle of Wight. Now the couple says the UK is trying to hush it up.
articles.lead_en: On June 16, the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich fired warning shots at a small private yacht that had drawn close to it in the English Channel. No one was injured.
articles.title_raw: A Russian warship fired warning shots at an elderly British couple near the Isle of Wight. Now the couple says the UK is trying to hush it up.
articles.lead_raw: On June 16, the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich fired warning shots at a small private yacht that had drawn close to it in the English Channel. No one was injured.

articles.title_en: No one injured as passenger plane makes emergency landing in Russia’s Sochi
articles.lead_en: There were 125 passengers and five crew members on board
articles.title_raw: No one injured as passenger plane makes emergency landing in Russia’s Sochi
articles.lead_raw: There were 125 passengers and five crew members on board

articles.title_en: Russia Deploys Emergency Crews to Siberia as Krasnoyarsk Wildfires Nearly Quadruple in Size
articles.lead_en: Authorities have blamed the rapid spread on high temperatures and severe Siberian silkmoth infestations, which have killed off vast swaths of trees and left behind large amounts of highly flammable deadwood.
articles.title_raw: Russia Deploys Emergency Crews to Siberia as Krasnoyarsk Wildfires Nearly Quadruple in Size
